description: DBOS provides libraries and tooling for building durable, failure-resilient applications and AI agents backed by a database. Its Conductor service adds workflow recovery, observability, management, permissions, and metrics for DBOS applications.
summary: DBOS exposes a Conductor HTTP API authenticated by DBOS-issued bearer API keys, a local DBOS CLI, and a DBOS MCP server for workflow introspection/management; no public OpenAPI/GraphQL surface was found.
